heading: Repeals as evidence of prior effectiveness
label: 111 Repeals as evidence of prior effectiveness
text: No inference shall be raised by the enactment of the Act of (ch. 202, ), that the sections of the Revised Statutes repealed by such Act were in force or effect at the time of such enactment: , That any rights or liabilities existing under such repealed sections shall not be affected by their repeal.March 3, 193347 Stat. 1431Provided, however
notes: References in TextAct of , referred to in text, was repealed by section 2 of act , section 1 of which enacted this title.March 3, 1933July 30, 1947
